element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic established immediately in Story Mode
Destructible environmental blocks fill levels; breaking reveals power-ups
Must be eliminated alongside block destruction to progress
All switches must be flipped to open gate; adds secondary objective layer
Boss battles punctuate world progression; first fought as ground-based opponent
Boss retreats into giant machine after initial defeat; escalates challenge
Increases bomb placement capacity; discovered through block destruction
Extends bomb blast radius; discovered through block destruction
Increases movement speed; discovered through block destruction
Grants tactical control; detonation on demand rather than timer
Extended range mechanic; bombs can reach distant targets
Damage mitigation; survive one additional hit before failure
Five Dastardly Bombers serve as difficulty scaling through campaign

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating all enemies in a room
typical_tension_triggers: Limited bomb placement capacity early game
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical puzzle-combat rhythm: exploration and block destruction interspersed with enemy avoidance and mandatory combat encounters; escalates per-world with boss confrontations serving as tension peaks

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Breakable blocks hide power-ups; exploration incentivized by potential stat gains

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces core mechanics (bomb placement, block destruction, enemy avoidance) in World 1 with Magnet Bomber; establishes baseline challenge
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Worlds 2-3 (Golem Bomber, Pretty Bomber) likely introduce enemy variety and maze complexity; power-up discovery becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Worlds 4-5 (Brain Bomber, Plasma Bomber) escalate challenge; final boss Plasma Bomber represents campaign climax after freeing imprisoned Bomberman
notable_spikes: World 1 boss transition: on-foot phase to machine phase
Magnet Bomber through Plasma Bomber escalation in final two worlds
Switch-hunting objective combined with active enemy spawns

notable_level_patterns.description: Each world repeats: navigate maze blocks → destroy obstacles for power-ups → eliminate all monsters → flip all switches → unlock gate → proceed to boss
Two-phase boss encounters (on-foot duel, then machine battle) with increasing mechanical complexity across Five Dastardly Bombers roster
Rewarding thorough block destruction with stat-increasing power-ups (bomb count, firepower, speed) and ability pickups (remote control, throwing, extra hit)
